login.title: Operator Login
login.remember_hint: Keep this operator session after the browser closes.

packs.title: Pack Operations
packs.subtitle: Manage world pack lifecycle, runtime state, and diagnostics.
packs.empty: No world packs found. Place a pack directory in the world_packs folder.
packs.confirm_unload:
Unload pack "{name}"?

The runtime will stop and active loop state may be lost.
packs.tooltip_enter_not_loaded: Load this pack first before entering.
packs.tooltip_enter_unhealthy: Pack runtime is unhealthy — load or reload to recover.

shell.recent_targets_empty: Recent operator pivots will appear here for quick return navigation.
shell.settings_placeholder: Avatar, profile summary, theme switching, and operator preferences will be surfaced here instead of occupying a fixed rail slot.

dock.traces_empty: Recent workflow trace pivots will appear here once scheduler and workflow selections are recorded.
dock.jobs_empty: Recent workflow jobs, scheduler runs, and agent pivots will appear here for quick reopening.
dock.notifications_empty: No notifications have been recorded yet.

overview.title: Operator Overview
overview.subtitle: Runtime, queue, and propagation summary
overview.description: A high-level operator snapshot of runtime health, recent events, active posts, workflow exceptions, and scheduler activity projected from the overview read model.
overview.runtime_snapshot_sub: Aggregated overview state for runtime, health, world pack, and clock formatting.
overview.notifications_sub: Current system queue snapshot and recent operator-facing warnings.
overview.scheduler_runs_sub: Recent scheduler scans with created/scanned counts, skip pressure, and worker attribution.
overview.scheduler_decisions_sub: Recent scheduler candidate outcomes for quick drill-down into workflow or agent context.
overview.recent_events_sub: Timeline-facing events from the overview aggregation endpoint.
overview.latest_posts_sub: Public social activity projected from the overview summary.
overview.latest_propagation_sub: Workflow entries associated with message propagation.
overview.failed_jobs_sub: Most recent workflow failures surfaced in overview.
overview.failed_jobs_empty: No failed jobs found in latest audit window.
overview.dropped_intents_sub: Dropped workflow outcomes surfaced by the overview read model.
overview.dropped_intents_empty: No dropped intents found in latest audit window.
overview.plugin_panels_sub: Pack-local web plugin contributions registered for the overview workspace.
overview.no_summary_desc: The operator overview will populate once the summary projection returns runtime and audit aggregates.
overview.latest_run_meta: Summary projection will populate after the runtime records scheduler runs.
overview.scheduler_summary_sub: Recent scheduler projection totals, highlights, ownership cues, and latest run context for operator triage.
overview.scheduler_summary_unavailable_desc: The summary projection will populate after recent scheduler runs are available.
overview.scheduler_trends_sub: Recent sampled scheduler runs with created cadence mix and detected signals.
overview.no_trend_samples_desc: Trend points will appear once recent scheduler runs have been sampled.

graph.title: Graph Projection
graph.subtitle: Relational and tree graph workspace
graph.description: Switch between mesh and tree views, filter node kinds, search graph projections, and inspect selected node semantics in the operator console.
graph.no_results_msg: Current graph filters returned no nodes. Clear filters or lower specificity to recover context.
graph.projection_summary_sub: Current graph read model counts, applied filters, and projection metadata.
graph.node_inspector_sub: Inspect node fields, references, metadata, and continue into related workspaces.
graph.no_node_selected_desc: Select a node from the graph canvas to inspect refs, metadata, and graph semantics.

scheduler.title: Scheduler Control Tower
scheduler.subtitle: Scheduler control tower
scheduler.description: Inspect scheduler health, recent run/decision activity, ownership topology, worker runtime state, and rebalance history from a unified operator projection.
scheduler.recent_runs_sub: Latest scheduler runs filtered by current partition / worker focus.
scheduler.recent_runs_empty: No scheduler runs available for the current filters.
scheduler.run_detail_sub: Selected scheduler run with worker, lease, and linkage detail.
scheduler.recent_decisions_sub: Candidate outcomes with workflow / agent drill-down.
scheduler.recent_decisions_empty: No scheduler decisions available for the current filters.
scheduler.ownership_sub: Current partition ownership with migration-aware context.
scheduler.ownership_empty: No ownership records available for the current filters.
scheduler.workers_sub: Worker runtime health and capacity snapshots.
scheduler.workers_empty: No scheduler workers available for the current filters.
scheduler.migrations_sub: Recent ownership migrations filtered by current worker / partition focus.
scheduler.migrations_empty: No ownership migrations available for the current filters.
scheduler.rebalance_sub: Recent rebalance recommendations, suppressions, and applies.
scheduler.rebalance_empty: No rebalance recommendations available for the current filters.
scheduler.no_run_selected_desc: Select a scheduler run to inspect partition, worker, lease, and linkage detail.
scheduler.latest_run_meta: Recent scheduler runs will populate after runtime snapshots are persisted.

social.title: Social Feed
social.subtitle: Public signal stream
social.description: Monitor public posts, scan signal density, and pivot from social chatter into the responsible agent or linked workflow intent.
social.no_posts: No social posts in current feed
social.no_posts_desc: Adjust author, keyword, or sort filters to inspect another slice of the public signal stream.
social.no_post_selected_desc: Select a post to inspect signal strength, author context, linked workflow, and its timeline hint.

timeline.title: Narrative Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Event stream and historical slices
timeline.description: Filter narrative events by tick range, review the most recent world changes, and jump from a timeline event into its linked workflow intent.
timeline.plugin_panels_sub: Pack-local web plugin contributions registered for the narrative timeline workspace.
timeline.no_events: No timeline events in current range
timeline.no_events_desc: Adjust the selected tick range to inspect another narrative slice.
timeline.no_event_selected_desc: Select a timeline event to inspect its type, tick position, linked workflow intent, and related social context.
timeline.priority_hint: Priority: use linked workflow intent when available; otherwise fall back to semantic keyword context.

workflow.title: Workflow Console
workflow.subtitle: Decision jobs and dispatch state
workflow.description: Inspect queued and completed jobs, review trace and intent details, and retry failed work without leaving the operator shell.
workflow.no_jobs: No workflow jobs in current view
workflow.no_jobs_desc: Adjust status, agent, or strategy filters to inspect another slice of the workflow queue.
workflow.job_snapshot_sub: Execution status, attempts, timestamps, and failure metadata.
workflow.no_job_selected_desc: Choose a job from the queue table to inspect attempts, request input, and retry state.
workflow.scheduler_context_sub: Operator source route and scheduler metadata inferred from current workflow selection.
workflow.no_scheduler_context_desc: Scheduler source details appear when this workflow was opened from operator drill-down or the job request includes scheduler metadata.
workflow.failure_context_sub: Failure code, reason, pending retry timing, and operator response path.
workflow.retry_eligible: This job is currently eligible for retry. Review the failure fields above before requesting another execution attempt.
workflow.retry_disabled: No failed workflow is selected. Retry actions stay disabled until a failed job is focused.
workflow.derived_state_sub: Decision, dispatch, workflow result, and final outcome summary.
workflow.no_workflow_desc: The derived workflow state appears once a job or trace selection resolves to a workflow snapshot.
workflow.related_entities_sub: Cross-entity drill-down for actor, target, intent, and trace records.
workflow.no_related_entities_desc: Actor, target, trace, or action intent references will appear here when the selected workflow exposes them.
workflow.trace_decision_sub: Provider, strategy, actor context, and normalized decision payload.
workflow.no_trace_desc: Select a job with a resolved inference trace to inspect model strategy, provider, and decision payload.
workflow.intent_dispatch_sub: Intent scheduling, transmission policy, actor/target refs, and payload.
workflow.no_intent_desc: Intent details appear after a trace resolves to a dispatchable action intent in the workflow projection.

agents.title: Agent Detail
agents.subtitle: Agent entry route
agents.desc_placeholder: Use canonical detail routes such as `/agents/{agent_id}` to inspect a concrete operator target.
agents.page_description: Inspect profile state, relation counts, recent workflow volume, memory trace density, and scheduler projection history for a selected agent.
agents.profile_sub: Core profile and state fields from agent overview projection.
agents.relationships_sub: Aggregated relation counts and binding summary.
agents.plugin_panels_sub: Pack-local web plugin contributions registered for the entity overview workspace.
agents.scheduler_timeline_desc: Recent scheduler decisions for this agent, including chosen reason, cadence kind, priority, partition context, and workflow linkage.
agents.no_skipped: No skipped decisions in the sampled window.
agents.no_runs: No related scheduler runs linked yet.
agents.no_created: No materialized workflow jobs linked from recent decisions.
agents.no_decisions: No scheduler decisions available for this agent yet.

plugins.title: Plugin Management
plugins.subtitle: Pack-local plugins
plugins.description: Inspect discovered plugins, review capability risk, confirm imports, and control enabled/disabled state for the active world pack.
plugins.ack_message: Enabling this plugin requires explicit acknowledgement of the canonical trust lecture before the backend will accept the enable operation.
plugins.plugins_list_sub: Current pack-local plugin installations for the active world pack.
plugins.plugins_empty: No plugin installations found for the active world pack.
plugins.plugin_detail_sub: Selected plugin manifest state, lifecycle, granted capabilities, and trust posture.
plugins.confirm_import_desc: Import confirmation chooses which requested capabilities will be granted to this installation. You can confirm with a reduced grant set if you want the plugin to stay partially inert.
plugins.enable_ack_desc: Explicit enable must respect the runtime warning policy exposed by the backend.
plugins.ack_checkbox: I acknowledge the canonical plugin enable warning and want to enable this trusted plugin for the active pack.
plugins.ack_not_required: Current runtime config shows the warning text but does not require acknowledgement before enable.
plugins.operator_note_text: This GUI now uses the same confirm / enable / disable backend APIs as CLI and server routes. Import still requires explicit confirmation, and explicit enable still respects plugins.enable_warning.enabled and plugins.enable_warning.require_acknowledgement.
plugins.no_plugin_selected_desc: Select a plugin installation from the left list to inspect lifecycle state and capability risk.
plugins.render_error_desc: Plugin runtime contribution failed to render.
plugins.route_host_sub: Dynamic plugin route contribution rendered under the canonical pack-local namespace.
plugins.route_not_found_desc: No plugin route contribution matched the current path.
